sections.paragraph:
Original: ארך

Transliteration: 'ârak

Phonetic: aw-rak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be long, prolong
    1. (Qal) to be long
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to prolong (days)
      2. to make long (tent cords)
      3. to grow long, continue long

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 162

Part(s) of speech: Verb
